name: SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA GAS CO
business: SoCalGas is a regulated public natural gas distribution utility serving customers throughout most of Southern California and part of central California. It sells natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers under a regulatory framework that permits recovery of costs through rates.

exposures.sentence: SoCalGas is a regulated public natural gas distribution utility, serving customers throughout most of Southern California and part of central California.

catalysts.event: CPUC issued a final decision for SoCalGas cost of capital for 2026 through 2028
catalysts.sentence: The CPUC issued an FD for SDG&E's and SoCalGas cost of capital for 2026 through 2028

catalysts.event: SoCalGas recorded a charge from disallowed regulatory recovery of COVID-19 costs
catalysts.sentence: $25 million charge in 2025 from disallowed regulatory recovery of COVID-19 costs
